overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic urban commercial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees, neon lighting, and digital advertisements, passing various NPCs sitting on benches and interacting near a glass railing overlooking a road.

two people sitting on the ground with a laptop

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier overlooking a lower road level
high-end store with black facade and white signage
futuristic light fixture with cyan illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway with a glass railing overlooking a road. Several NPCs are gathered near the railing - a woman in a pink jacket takes photos while two others sit on the ground with a laptop. The camera walks forward past them toward a storefront labeled 'AVANTE' with neon lighting accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with purple neon lighting

events.description: moving deeper into the covered walkway away from the glass railing area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: woman in pink jacket dancing and taking photos

entered.detail: overhead glass and metal canopy with purple neon trim
vivid purple neon lighting along structural beams

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered pedestrian arcade featuring purple neon lighting and palm trees in planters. The woman in the pink jacket remains visible on the left, dancing and taking photos. The architecture features modern glass and steel with the 'AVANTE' store still visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view between futuristic towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the skyscrapers and sun reflection
camera tilts back down to walking level

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the architecture and sun reflection on glass buildings

entered.detail: tall futuristic tower with reflective glass facade
angular modern architecture with teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal towering futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces. Sunlight glints off the geometric building facades against a clear blue sky. After several seconds admiring the architecture, the camera tilts back down to resume walking level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with benches and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past benches where NPCs are sitting and using devices

notable_agents.action: two men in vintage hats sitting on a bench, one using a tablet
woman sitting on bench looking at her phone

entered.detail: returning to the covered arcade with overhead canopy
large illuminated advertisement screens including Arasaka branding
modern black seating along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Back at walking level, the camera proceeds through the covered walkway lined with benches and digital billboards. Several NPCs are seated on the benches - notably two men wearing vintage-style hats and a woman using her phone. Large digital advertisements including Arasaka branding illuminate the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with large digital advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza with reflective flooring

agents.ego_description: approaching an open plaza area with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: towering advertisement screens with vivid product displays
digital billboard displaying a burger with promotional text
polished marble-like surface reflecting the advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a spacious open plaza with highly reflective flooring that mirrors the surrounding digital billboards. Large advertisements for cola and burgers dominate the walls. The environment opens up to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape with glass towers in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit pedestrian arcade that gradually opens into a vast, reflective futuristic plaza. It begins on a covered walkway where the camera passes NPCs gathered by a glass railing before moving toward a storefront labeled AVANTE accented with purple neon and palm trees. As the camera proceeds, it tilts upward to reveal towering geometric skyscrapers glinting under a clear blue sky before returning to eye level to pass digital billboards and seated figures in vintage hats. The scene then shifts past large Arasaka advertisements and rows of benches, moving steadily forward until the covered architecture gives way to an open space. Finally, the camera exits into a spacious plaza with highly reflective flooring that mirrors massive cola and burger advertisements against a backdrop of distant glass towers.
